ab: ya smapuk sa mashmash apasain sa qadup, numa ya smapuk sa tikulhath apasain sa mahaqu, ya miazithu mubalabalay.
ch: A:老鼠應該要⽤⽯壓式陷阱抓，⽵雞應該要⽤套頸式陷阱抓，這樣才對。
en: It is correct to catch mice through rangay and catch bamboo partridges through qjiulang.

ab: naur ya miazithu, muririw tu suma iaku, amaqa iaku antu mara.
ch: B:原來是這樣，我都搞錯了！難怪我都抓不到。
en: No wonder! I am mistaken and that’s why I cannot catch any of them.

ab: pinfazaq iaku ihun amiakuza kmalawa s izai latusha wa tuqris.
ch: A:那我再教你怎麼製作這兩種陷阱。
en: Then I will teach you how to set up these two traps.

ab: ua! maqitan, ya miazithu shduu iaku mara sa lhkaribush ya kahiza.
ch: B:好啊！太棒了！這樣我以後就會抓到獵物了。
en: Great! I will be able to catch the prey in the future.

ab: buhat a lhmir mathuaw marutawiza, usuiwan uhu thapa mara sa kaklhit, amutusi ita buhat.
ch: A:田裡的草太長了，你去倉庫拿鐮刀，我們去田裡。
en: The grass in the fields is too tall. Go to the warehouse to take the sickle and let’s go to the fields.

ab: pintuan sa kaklhit?
ch: B:鐮刀放在哪裡?
en: Where are the sickles?

ab: isai lhalhahi a shirshir, makuntantu ihu thapa ashaqtuniza.
ch: A:在背簍的旁邊，你進去倉庫就會看到了。
en: Beside the back basket, you will see it when you enter the warehouse.

ab: inanuru ya mara ata tu klhitin, mathuaw kaklhit malamlam.
ch: A:小心拿不要割到，鐮刀很利。
en: Be careful and don’t get hurt. The sickle is very sharp.

ab: ata tu kangqthaan naak a tuqris.
ch: A:不要踩到我的陷阱！
en: Don’t step on my trap!

ab: intua s mihu a tuqris?
ch: B:你的陷阱在哪裡?
en: Where is your trap?

ab: naak a tuqris isai huya wa ribush a bangqir.
ch: A:我的陷阱在那棵樹的下面。
en: My trap is under that tree.

ab: minu ihu qa mangqtuqtu?
ch: B:你怎麼會記得?
en: How do you remember?

ab: pinataqal iaku izai, mafazaq iaku naak a tuqris ya intua.
ch: A:我在這邊有做記號，我知道我的陷阱在哪裡。
en: I make a mark here, so I know where my trap is.

ab: haya wa lhalhuzu, pulhalhuzu iamin falhaza wa shirshir smapuk sa rusaw.
ch: A:這是魚筌，我們放在溪邊捕魚。
en: This is a fish trap which we put beside the river for fishing.

ab: uka iamin lhalhuzu, pasain iamin paniza ya maniza sa rusaw.
ch: B:我們那邊沒有魚筌，我們都用釣竿抓魚。
en: We don’t have any fish traps there, so we catch fish with a fishing rod.

ab: iaku antu pinasa paniza, shduu ihu suma wa qali pinfazaq iakin?
ch: A:我沒有用過釣竿，你改天教我好嗎?
en: I have never used a fishing rod before, would you mind teaching me next time?

ab: ua! suma wa qali apalhintaz ita musui maniza sa rusaw.
ch: B:好啊!我們改天一起去釣魚。
en: Sure! Let’s go fishing together next time.

ab: ya suma wa qali apinfazaq iaku ihun kmalawa sa lhalhuzu.
ch: A:那我改天教你做魚筌。
en: I will teach you how to make a fish trap next time.

ab: makakakri mihu a paniza, qazii ya mupaniza sa rusaw, iahiaw shmuruz ihu.
ch: A:你的釣竿動了，是不是有魚上鉤了!你快拉起來。
en: Your fishing rod is moving. Isn’t the fish on the hook? Pull it up!

ab: italhawan, ma’a’a’inur sa ruza, inai iaku shmuruz sa paniza, utusiwan uhu mara sa dawaz.
ch: B:等等，船太晃了。我在這邊拉釣竿，你去那邊幫我拿網子來。
en: Wait, the ship is rolling heavily. I am here to pull the fishing rod and you should go there to grab me the net.

ab: shuruz ihu sa rusaw pakunanai, shuruzikuan sa rusaw.
ch: A:你把魚拉到我這邊，我幫妳拉起來。
en: Pull the fish to my side and I will help you pull it up.

ab: mathuaw maqitan! u’araan manasha sa rusaw thuini, mathuaw mapunishiza luluman sa rusaw.
ch: A:太好了!今天大豐收，魚簍都裝滿了。
en: Great! It is a bumper crop today with full fish baskets.

ab: iahiaw mutaun ita mashtay kungqruman.
ch: B:我們快回去和大家分享。
en: Let’s go back immediately and share it with everyone.
